title: lolium temulentum var. subulatum
intro: Lolium temulentum var. subulatum is a variant of the darnel, a type of grass belonging to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Lolium temulentum var. subulatum include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
